emails.subject: CPUC Questions on DA
emails.body: CPUC Questions on DA Sue Received your voice mail. Having AReM only file is ok with me. Spoke with Lamar Frazier Jeremy sounds worried. Let's make sure that the contract question is vetted with internal and external lawyers agree not to give CPUC any info. Thanks, Jim

emails.subject: RE: CPUC Questions on DA
emails.body: RE: CPUC Questions on DA Will do. To: Mara, Susan; Dasovich, Jeff

emails.subject: RE: CPUC Questions on DA
emails.body: Thanks. To: Steffes, James D.; Dasovich, Jeff
